description_long: This is a two-story commercial cafe building with a flat roof and a modern, boxy architectural style. The facade features large, evenly spaced rectangular windows on both floors, allowing for ample natural light inside. At the front, there is a row of outdoor seating with green chairs and tables, suggesting a welcoming space for patrons to enjoy their drinks outside. The building is set on a paved platform, and there are a few distinct exterior elements, including a circular sign above the entrance and a couple of geometric structures nearby, possibly for signage or decoration. The exterior is primarily white with some black and green accents, giving it a clean and contemporary look. The overall structure appears to be made of concrete or plaster, with glass windows and metal or plastic furniture for the outdoor seating.
description: A modern, two-story cafe with large windows, outdoor green seating, and a clean white facade accented by signage and geometric features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, outdoor green seating, and a circular sign above the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building, side windows, and a geometric structure adjacent to the cafe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with rows of windows and minimal exterior features.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the secondary entrance or rear, with additional outdoor seating visible.
